ew_context: Price attempting to break above key resistance in what appears to be a corrective bounce from recent lows - potential wave B or X wave structure
pattern_desc: Breakout above key resistance level at 1.1562 with 3 prior touches. Price breaking above consolidation range despite bearish EMA structure.
invalidation: Failure to hold above 1.1562 on M15 timeframe negates the breakout
market_context: Crypto sector under pressure from negative news flow including North Korean hacker attacks and treasury losses, creating headwinds for DOT
